summary:
The “needle” was the wrong character-set used to read the CSV.  
CsvReader was hard-coded to ISO-8859-1, corrupting every non-ASCII name.

Fix applied:
1. In app/CsvReader.java  
   • Added import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;  
   • Replaced the ISO-8859-1 constant with StandardCharsets.UTF_8.

2. Re-compiled and ran the harness – every Unicode name now round-trips, and test.sh reports: “PASS: All customer names preserved correctly”.

All tests succeed.
